title: malva lutea
intro: Malva lutea is a perennial plant species belonging to the Malvaceae family, also known as the hollyhock or mallow family. The plant is rich in mucilages, making it a natural anti-inflammatory agent with medicinal properties, particularly in soothing digestive issues, skin irritations, and respiratory problems. The health benefits of Malva lutea include reducing inflammation, relieving menstrual cramps, and promoting healthy digestion. Malva lutea can be prepared in various herbal forms, such as teas, infusions, tinctures, and poultices, to harness its medicinal properties and therapeutic benefits.
